description: Multi-language automated exam generation and grading system

features.name: Authentication & Session Management API
features.description: Provides user registration, login, role verification, and secure JWT session management.
features.evidence: Full auth arc DONE (stdlib, zero deps): (core) security.py PBKDF2-SHA256 + HS256 JWT + deps.py get_current_user/require_role/get_current_user_optional (SPEC-AUTH-001/002/003); (Gate-1) sensitive endpoints gated with require_role (SPEC-AUTH-004); (Gate-2) frontend login — api.ts token mgmt (localStorage, typeof window guard) + loginRequest + authHeaders on protected calls + 401 auto-clear; login/page.tsx; /admin & /admin/bank redirect to /login if unauthenticated + Logout. Claude verified INDEPENDENTLY in browser (preview + real backend with seeded admin): unauth /admin -> /login; login admin -> /admin (stats load) & /admin/bank (lists draft); logout clears token -> /login; candidate /exam/{id} opens WITHOUT login; teacher-answer toggle without auth -> graceful 'không có quyền' amber banner (Claude fixed a notice-persistence bug where the revert re-fetch wiped it) + answers stay hidden + no crash; console 0 errors; npm run build PASS. NOTE: verified on Dat; the LIVE demo (main) still has OPEN endpoints until Dat->main is merged + a strong ADMIN_PASSWORD env is set on Render.

features.name: Database Migrations Engine
features.description: Uses Alembic migrations to automatically apply and rollback database schema changes.
features.evidence: Alembic configured in backend/alembic (env.py reads DATABASE_URL from settings, engine built in code so no creds in alembic.ini). 2 migrations: 3a99aac81951 (baseline 7 tables) + 69936c2cdac2 (M2: blueprints, import_batches, content_hash/source_question_id/import_batch_id). Verified MANUALLY: `alembic upgrade head` runs clean on empty PostgreSQL 17 (both revisions applied; Migration 2's ALTER ADD CONSTRAINT is PG-only, fails on SQLite by design). No automated pytest coverage — tests use create_all() on SQLite in-memory. Task 0c, PR #16 (0c265c9).

features.name: Exam & Question Bank CRUD API
features.description: Enables teachers to manage exams, view question banks, and approve imported questions.
features.evidence: Bank-admin CRUD API (A5, SPEC-BANK-003) + Exam generation API (SPEC-EXAM-001, SPEC-GEN-004) done. Bank-admin UI (A6) at /admin/bank (bulk approve draft). Endpoints GATED (Gate-1, SPEC-AUTH-004: admin/teacher only; include_answers teacher-only) + frontend login (Gate-2) securing /admin & /admin/bank behind JWT. Exam lifecycle CRUD (A7, SPEC-EXAM-002: update metadata, release, retire, and candidate-view filtering) completed and protected under auth gating. Candidates or guest users are restricted from viewing retired exams (receive 404). Verified via integration tests (test_specs_exam.py). Lifecycle UI (A8, frontend) at /admin: per-exam status badge (Đã phát hành/Đã ẩn), Ẩn đề/Phát hành toggle, inline Sửa (title+duration) — listExams forwards auth so admins see retired exams while guests get active-only. npm run build PASS; Claude verified in browser on real demo DB (retire flips badge & keeps exam in admin list, guest list hides retired, inline edit saves without 422).

features.name: Candidate Exam Room Front-end
features.description: Provides webcam proctoring hooks, tab visibility checking, and compressed Opus/WebM audio recording.
features.evidence: PROCTORING now wired into the exam room (C13, frontend-only, no model/spec change). frontend/src/app/exam/[id]/TakeView.tsx integrates useProctoring.ts: (1) a consent gate before questions render — explains webcam monitoring + fullscreen requirement + that tab-switch/fullscreen-exit are recorded + that 3 violations auto-submit; (2) startExam() enters the room: requestFullscreen + startWebcam (best-effort; a denied camera is non-fatal and shows 'Webcam chưa bật'); (3) live webcam self-view PiP (bottom-right) + '● Đang giám sát' badge; (4) violation counter '⚠ N/3' in the header; (5) warning banner on each violation (auto-dismiss 5s); (6) auto-submit (handleSubmit(true)) once MAX_VIOLATIONS=3 is reached, reusing the same submit path as the C12 timer; (7) the countdown timer now starts when the candidate enters the room (not on page load); 'Làm lại' reset handlers re-enter the proctoring gate + reset violations/timer. useMediaRecorder.ts is already used for Speaking answers (C10). Claude verified INDEPENDENTLY in browser (preview + real backend on demo_toeic.db with a candidate token): consent gate renders all notices; start -> 200 questions + counter ⚠0/3 + timer counting from 120:00 + webcam PiP ('chưa bật' degraded in headless, no camera) + monitoring badge; simulated tab-switch (visibilitychange) -> counter 1/3 then 2/3 + warning banner text; 3rd violation -> AUTO-SUBMIT POST -> result panel '10 ĐIỂM · COMPLETED' (blank-exam floor). npm run build PASS (route /exam/[id]/take), tsc --noEmit clean; console shows only the expected headless webcam/fullscreen NotAllowedError (caught by the hook, non-fatal). LIMITATION / FOLLOW-UP: violations are enforced CLIENT-SIDE only (warn + auto-submit) and NOT persisted server-side — a teacher-visible proctoring report needs a Submission.proctoring_log/violation_count column (frozen model -> needs Đạt approval, like exam_type/language). Real webcam/fullscreen capture cannot be driven in the headless preview (no camera, no user-gesture fullscreen) -> needs a manual check on a real browser. B1-FE (S42, 25/06, commit 05ce639, frontend-only, 2 files): TakeView now renders the candidate VSTEP B1 exam — (1) api.ts audioSrc resolves leading-'/' paths (B1 Listening audio_url '/audio/...mp3' now plays; TOEIC bare-filename path unchanged -> no regress); (2) QuestionItem adds a multi-image picture-choice branch (comma-separated image_url; DORMANT on real 2601 which embeds one composite A/B/C image, kept as forward-looking fallback) AND a letter-only-button branch (A/B/C) when options are all-empty (the real 2601 picture-choice = 1 composite image above + clean A/B/C buttons, replacing blank-label radios), placed BEFORE the radio branch + storing the LETTER; (3) explicit type='fill' text input. Claude verified INDEPENDENTLY on REAL data (exam 2601): npm run build + tsc clean; the composite image (135KB jpg) AND the 42MB Listening mp3 both serve 200 via the exact URLs audioSrc/imageSrc produce; data cross-check confirms 5 picture-choice -> letter buttons + 20 fill -> text input, and the TOEIC exam has 0 all-empty-options questions so the new letter-button branch never fires (no TOEIC regression). Anti respected boundaries (2 frontend files, no backend/models/harness). 🚀 DEPLOYED LIVE (S42, 25/06, origin/main=origin/Dat=f1453dd): pushed the whole B1 track (S39 exam_type column + S40 parser + S41 100-pt grading + S42 frontend + B1-DEPLOY cloud_bootstrap) to main. Claude verified LIVE: backend GET /api/v1/exams/4 = 'VSTEP B1 — Đề 2601 (đề thật)' 50 questions (Part 1-3 choice + Part 4 fill Reading; Part 5-6 writing; Part 7 picture-choice w/ audio+image + Part 8 fill Listening; Part 9-11 speaking); composite image /static/img/LB12601/q1_A.jpg serves 200; Listening audio /audio/...mp3 serves 206 (range/stream); Vercel production bundle contains all B1-FE markers ('Điền từ vào đây', 'Lựa chọn ', 'grid-cols-3', 'flex flex-wrap gap-3'). B1-DEPLOY cloud_bootstrap (.docx-preferred, no LibreOffice on Render; idempotency split TOEIC/B1; try/except isolation) verified end-to-end against the real Drive folder (after Đạt uploaded the 2 .docx) before push.

features.name: Gemini AI Grading Service
features.description: Connects to Gemini API to grade writing essays and speaking audio recordings based on rubrics.
features.evidence: backend/app/services/ai_grading.py — grade_writing()/grade_speaking() with safe mock fallback; verified by tests/test_specs_grading.py::test_SPEC_GRADE_004_ai_grading_degrades_safely (SPEC-GRADE-004 active). REAL-MODE SPEAKING FIX (C14): grade_speaking previously did httpx.get() on the stored relative path (/static/uploads/xxx.webm) which raises UnsupportedProtocol -> real-mode Speaking always scored 0 the moment GEMINI_API_KEY is set. Added _load_audio_bytes() that reads local /static paths straight from disk (robust on single-host Render — no self-HTTP/public-URL needed) while still fetching genuine http(s) URLs (remote storage); mime type now derived from the recording extension. Guarded by tests/test_specs_grading.py::test_grade_speaking_real_mode_loads_local_static_audio (FakeModel forces the real-mode branch + a real local file -> asserts the model receives the exact disk bytes and returns the parsed score; non-tautological — fails before the fix). Full suite 54 passed / 0 failed; ruff + architecture clean. C20 REAL-MODE NOW ACTUALLY WORKS (verified with a real key in backend/.env): while verifying the full VSTEP B1 exam, real grading surfaced TWO bugs — (1) the hardcoded model 'gemini-1.5-flash' was RETIRED by Google -> every real Writing/Speaking call returned 404; (2) a Speaking question submitted without a recording hit _load_audio_bytes(None) -> AttributeError. Fixes: model id is now config-driven (settings.GEMINI_MODEL, default 'gemini-2.5-flash' — one of 37 models the key lists; swappable via .env so a future retirement is a config change, not code); grade_speaking guards a missing audio_url -> returns score 0 + 'Không có bản ghi âm' gracefully (no crash). VERIFIED with the real Gemini key (local): submitted VSTEP B1 -> Writing graded by Gemini 2.5 (score 6.5 + specific real feedback 'The student's essay is remarkably clear, concise, and grammatically accurate...'), Speaking-without-audio -> 0.0 (no crash), MCQ 3/9; backend log shows no 404/AttributeError. Guard test tests/test_specs_grading.py::test_grade_speaking_without_audio_does_not_crash (FakeModel asserts model is NOT called when audio missing). Full suite 60/0/0. NOTE: LIVE/Render still mock (no key there) — set GEMINI_API_KEY on Render to enable real grading in production. S37 (24/06): SDK migrated off the EOL google-generativeai onto the supported google-genai (requirements pinned google-genai>=2.10.0,<3.0.0, resolved 2.10.0); ai_grading.py now uses genai.Client + types.GenerateContentConfig + types.Part.from_bytes (mock path + dict shapes preserved; alias self.model=self.client keeps the mock-mode monkeypatch tests unchanged; the two real-mode guards refactored to the new SDK shape with assertions intact). Claude independently verified: pytest 60/0 twice, ruff + architecture clean, EOL FutureWarning gone, grep confirms no old-SDK references; real-mode exercised with the local key (gemini-flash-latest returned a genuine score 4.0 + feedback + grammar_errors, proving the new client.models.generate_content + json.loads(response.text) path works end-to-end; default gemini-2.5-flash returns 503=busy not 404=retired). Anti executed on Dat (uncommitted), committed locally by Claude; push/deploy held for Đạt. S38 (24/06): default grading model bumped settings.GEMINI_MODEL 'gemini-2.5-flash' -> 'gemini-3.5-flash' (Đạt: use the newest/best flash). Verified the key supports it via client.models.list() (also exposes gemini-3-flash-preview / gemini-3.1-*); on the free tier 3.5-flash currently returns 503=busy (NOT 404=retired) so a real grade couldn't be pulled through at test time, but the guard/try-except returns 0 gracefully and it works once capacity frees up — override GEMINI_MODEL=gemini-flash-latest via env if 503 persists. Deployed (origin/main 3095396). S38-retry (SPEC-GRADE-005, branch feat/grading-retry): added _call_with_retry to ai_grading.py — exponential backoff + jitter on TRANSIENT Gemini errors (APIError.code 503/429, .status UNAVAILABLE/RESOURCE_EXHAUSTED, httpx timeout), fail-fast on PERMANENT errors (404/401/403 re-raised immediately), total sleep capped <=20s (grading runs inline in the submit request on Render free → avoid HTTP timeout); on retry exhaustion keeps the existing graceful score-0 + error-feedback path (no crash). config.py adds env-tunable GEMINI_MAX_RETRIES(4) + GEMINI_RETRY_BASE_DELAY(1.5). Keeps gemini-3.5-flash. Claude verified independently: test_SPEC_GRADE_005 is non-tautological — raises REAL google.genai.errors.ServerError/ClientError (so the .code/.status/.message transient-detection is checked against the actual SDK exception shape) across 4 cases (503x2->success/3 calls; 404->fail-fast/1 call/0; 429-forever->exactly 5 calls/0; large base_delay->cumulative sleep<=20s); pytest 63/0 x2, ruff/architecture clean, correct branch + no harness touched. Context (Đạt 25/06): after Đạt set GEMINI_API_KEY on Render, LIVE grading returned 503 (NOT mock -> key WORKS; it's free-tier + 3.5-flash saturation). MVP scaling direction = ~20-30 concurrent on free is enough, defer 500-1000 paid scaling to the very end (see [[mvp-scaling-decision]]). MODEL DECISION (25/06, after empirical load measurement): default GEMINI_MODEL reverted gemini-3.5-flash -> gemini-2.5-flash for the FREE MVP phase. Measured on real Gemini free tier: gemini-3.5-flash returns 503 'high demand' even for a SINGLE call (0/1), while gemini-2.5-flash grades 15/15 concurrent essays OK (~12s each with retry). Root-caused (client.models.get): NOT our bug — 3.5-flash name is valid (error is 503 not 404), our code is correct (2.5-flash works with identical code), it's that 3.5-flash (version 3.5-flash-05-2026, released ~1 month ago) gets near-zero FREE capacity from Google (reserved for paid). gemini-3.5-flash stays the target for when on a PAID tier (env-swappable GEMINI_MODEL, no code change). Deployed retry LIVE (origin/main 030d11d).

features.name: Background Task Grading Queue
features.description: Celery workers consume submitted candidate exams from Redis queue and trigger asynchronous grading.
features.evidence: app/core/celery.py configured; app/workers/tasks.py grade_submission_task NOW WIRED to the submit API (SPEC-GRADE-003 active). submission_admin.create_submission_and_grade routes by question type: exams containing writing/speaking questions enqueue grade_submission_task.delay() and return immediately with status='grading' (no scores); the worker grades essays via ai_grading_service (Gemini, mock-safe degrade per SPEC-GRADE-004) and writes Grade.score_writing/score_speaking + submission.status='completed'. Pure multiple-choice TOEIC exams keep synchronous scaled grading (SPEC-SUBMIT-001 unchanged); non-TOEIC exams without essays still 400. No model change (Grade already had score_writing/score_speaking/feedback_* columns). Verified by tests/test_specs_grading.py::test_SPEC_GRADE_003_async_grading_via_celery (celery task_always_eager + AI mock mode + worker SessionLocal pointed at the test engine; asserts immediate 'grading' response then worker fills grades + status='completed'). NOTE: SPEC-GRADE-003 test runs in eager mode; a real Redis broker + `celery -A app.core.celery worker` is needed for true async in production. Speaking path is wired in the worker but no audio-upload submit flow/UI exists yet.

features.name: English Exam Ingestion Engine
features.description: Parses Word/Excel/MP3 data, extracts sections, maps audio files, and runs UTF-8 formatting validators.
features.evidence: backend/app/services/parser.py — import_file(db, filepath, audio_dir=None) parses .docx [Group]/[Question] blocks (python-docx), validation gate (missing options/answer, invalid part, missing Listening audio file), atomic save via ImportBatch, idempotent dedup via content_hash on bank (exam_id IS NULL), items stored status='draft'. Verified by tests/test_specs_parser.py: SPEC-PARSE-001/002/003/004 active (no incomplete questions; Listening audio existence per convention {SetID}_P{Part}_{NN}.mp3; idempotent reimport; all-or-nothing + JSON error report). A3 (d2388e8, SPEC-PARSE-005 active): parse_answer_key(filepath) reads answer keys from separate .xlsx (openpyxl, scans 'Câu'/'Đáp án' header, merges 5 column-blocks) — VERIFIED on REAL partner file Key LT2601.xlsx (100 answers, matches actual data). IMPORTANT: current import_file parses a SYNTHETIC .docx format ([Group]/[Question], inline answers) that does NOT match real partner docs (real = Word tables + images, answers in separate .xlsx). Real parser track STEP ① DONE — parse_listening_docx(filepath)->{set_id, items} (SPEC-PARSE-006 active); STEP ② DONE — import_listening_set(db, docx_path, key_path) merges answer keys into questions by Mã đề+number, validates items, registers ImportBatch, and commits all questions/groups to the DB question bank with status='draft' (SPEC-PARSE-007 active). Fixed question-level hash collision in Part 1 and Part 2 (where identical content and empty options caused duplicate elimination) by incorporating set_id and question number in calculate_question_hash and set_id in calculate_group_hash, while preserving backward compatibility. Verified on real file pair LT2601.docx + Key LT2601.xlsx to produce 100/100 unique question hashes and 23/23 group hashes with 0 collisions. STEP ③ DONE — convert_doc_to_docx(filepath, out_dir=None) converts legacy .doc -> .docx via headless LibreOffice (soffice --headless --convert-to docx), with .docx passthrough, result caching, and clear FileNotFoundError when soffice missing (SPEC-PARSE-008 active). CI tests are MOCK-ONLY (passthrough + missing-tool + cache via tmp_path); REAL .doc conversion VERIFIED on machine (15/06, LibreOffice 26.2 installed): convert_doc_to_docx round-trips a real binary .doc -> .docx preserving 15 tables, python-docx reads output (soffice headless via the function's Windows fallback path). Actual partner RT*.doc will be exercised when building the Reading parser. STEP ④ DONE — parse_reading_docx(filepath)->{set_id, items} parses real Reading RT*.docx (SPEC-PARSE-009 active): P5 standalone (Q1-30), P6 4-blank passages (Q31-46), P7 single/double/triple passages with images (Q47-100); robust option extraction handling inline-A, all-options-inline (re.DOTALL + regex-split on (A-D) markers), sandwich quotation paragraphs, and 4x2 option tables. VERIFIED on REAL 'CDR TOEIC - RT2605.docx': 100 questions, 0 incomplete (every question exactly 4 options A-D). Two fixture-invisible bugs caught at Claude review and fixed: infinite loop (inner loop never advanced j) and option loss (30/70 grouped questions). STEP ⑤ DONE — import_exam_set(db, docx_path, key_path, exam_type, audio_dir=None) generalizes merge+import for BOTH Listening and Reading (dispatch parser by exam_type, LT|RT set_id); import_listening_set/import_reading_set are thin wrappers (SPEC-PARSE-010 active). VERIFIED on real data (Claude independent): LT2601 -> 100 questions/23 groups, RT2605 -> 100 questions/20 groups, both idempotent; LT+RT coexist in one DB (200 questions/43 groups/0 without answer). MILESTONE: full Listening+Reading TEXT pipeline (parse .docx/.doc + merge .xlsx keys + import to bank) works on real partner data. Remaining: compiled-MP3 audio rework (Listening audio model). STEP ⑥ DONE — find_audio_file(audio_dir, set_id) + import_exam_set link consolidated MP3 to audio_url at FILE level by filename range/single match (anchored regex), non-fatal (None if absent), reporting audio_linked + audio_ambiguous (SPEC-PARSE-011 active). Decision (Đạt+Claude): NO audio cutting — matrix has no such rule, partner has no timestamps, models frozen, cutting needs a new dep. Verified on 15 real MP3 filenames: all 15 sets mapped; only LT2603/LT2605 ambiguous (overlapping partner ranges). MILESTONE: real ingestion pipeline COMPLETE (parse .docx/.doc + merge .xlsx keys + link audio -> bank), verified on real partner data (LT2601+RT2605 = 200 questions + audio). Status -> active. Remaining for broader feature: HTTP API exposure (separate bank-admin-api feature); legacy synthetic import_file superseded by import_exam_set for real data. Tasks A1 (fe11fa3) + A2 (c019be0) + A3 (d2388e8) + PARSE-006 (8239a88 + c65eb57) + PARSE-007 (a6fdf99) + PARSE-008 (37c25cc + cfd5431) + PARSE-009 (4668e44 + 0712a8a) + PARSE-010 (e2941f3) + PARSE-011 (ef2ced4). PARSE-012 (S39, branch feat/parser-b1, SPEC-PARSE-012, parse-only): B1 (VSTEP) Reading+Writing parser — parse_b1_reading_docx + parse_b1_answer_key in parser.py for the European-framework B1 format (DIFFERENT from TOEIC: paragraph-based, not table-heavy). Handles the 4 reading sections (S1 Q1-10 MCQ 4-opt inline; S2 Q11-15 MCQ 3-opt in a 5x3 table of notices; S3 Q16-20 MCQ 4-opt on separate lines + passage; S4 Q21-30 gap-fill words, no A/B/C/D) + 2 writing tasks (Q31-32), and the answer key (table SECTION blocks scanned by 'Câu' header; Q1-20 letters, Q21-30 words). make_fixtures.py extended with a synthetic B1 fixture (TOEIC fixtures kept intact). Claude verified independently INCLUDING the REAL partner file drive_input/B1_2601/EB1-2601.docx: set_id EB12601, 32 items (20 choice + 10 fill + 2 writing), per-section option counts correct (4/3/4/0), 30 answers extracted correctly. pytest 64/0 x2 (no TOEIC parser regression), ruff/architecture/traceability clean, CI-safe (committed test uses synthetic fixture only, never reads drive_input). Parse-only: NOT wired to DB/API yet (step ② = merge keys + import as a real B1 exam, avoiding the frozen-model exam_type column). NOT deployed (parse-only, no live effect). PARSE-013 (S40, branch feat/parser-b1-ls, parse-only): B1 Listening + Speaking parsers — parse_b1_listening_docx (15 Q: Q1-5 picture-choice MCQ A/B/C with best-effort cell-level image extraction via get_cell_image_indices; Q6-15 fill note-completion; set_id with footer/filename fallback), parse_b1_listening_key (.doc -> convert_doc_to_docx -> scan 6x3 table -> 15 answers), parse_b1_speaking_card (.doc convert, filters the right card from a 10-exam merged file by set_id digits, extracts 3 speaking parts). make_fixtures adds B1 Listening/Speaking .docx fixtures with in-memory PNGs (CI-safe; no Pillow/LibreOffice needed; committed test never converts .doc or reads drive_input). Claude verified independently INCLUDING the REAL files (LB1-2601.docx + the .doc answer key + the .doc speaking card, converted locally via LibreOffice): set_id LB12601, 15 questions (5 choice + 10 fill), all 15 listening answers match (Q1-5 C,B,A,B,C; Q6-15 words), speaking card 2601 -> 3 parts correct. pytest 66/0 x2 (parser 13/13, no regression), ruff/architecture/traceability clean. NOW ALL 4 B1 SKILLS PARSE FROM REAL FILES (Reading/Writing PARSE-012 + Listening/Speaking PARSE-013). NOT deployed. Note: convert_doc_to_docx (PARSE-008) on Windows logs a non-fatal UnicodeDecodeError from the soffice stderr reader thread (conversion output is still correct) — latent, to watch. [S50 01/07] XÓA HẲN parser TOEIC (import_file/parse_listening_docx/parse_reading_docx/import_exam_set... + SPEC-PARSE-001..011) — chỉ còn parser B1 (parse_b1_*/import_b1_*, SPEC-PARSE-012/013). GIỮ calculate_*_hash (enrichment dùng).

features.name: TOEIC & B1 Exam Generator
features.description: Retrieves questions from the approved question bank and matches exam blueprints dynamically.
features.evidence: TOEIC generator near-complete: status='approved' filter (BANK-001), seeded reproducibility (GEN-005), fail-fast pre-checks (GEN-006), Part 7 subset-sum (GEN-001), adaptive topic-diversity cap (GEN-003), option balance (GEN-002), per-part difficulty matrix (MATRIX-002 per-part), post-check validator gate (SPEC-VALIDATE-001), batch generation with ENFORCED pairwise overlap <= 40% (SPEC-GEN-004 active), and whole-exam difficulty ratio 25/50/25 (SPEC-MATRIX-002 whole-exam active). generate_batch (toeic_generator.py) enforces the limit via deterministic resample-on-violation (bounded 10*count attempts), atomic batch rollback on failure, and uses expunge_all + temporary expire_on_commit=False so the session stays clean (0 SAWarnings) and detached exams remain readable on the API path. API POST /api/v1/exams/generate-batch returns summaries + overlap_report (threshold, resample_count) + validation summary. test_SPEC_GEN_004_cross_exam_overlap loops base_seed [5,8,21,23] (incl. seeds 8 & 21 that need resampling) asserting 0 < max_overlap <= 0.40 on a 4x surplus bank with diverse Part 7 group sizes (2-6). Claude verified independently: 0/30 random seeds exceed 40% (enforcement holds; without it 2/30 failed), API path safe with resample (no DetachedInstanceError), suite clean. Data-driven generation supported (GEN-007). Whole-exam difficulty balanced by configuring mock bank P7 difficulties in conftest.py such that the subset-sum selection yields exactly 15E/25M/14H. S39 (25/06, branch feat/multi-exam-type-b1, SPEC-BANK-004): MULTI-EXAM-TYPE BANK UNLOCKED — Đạt approved the FIRST frozen-model change since 0c. Question gains exam_type (default 'TOEIC') + language (default 'EN') columns + alembic migration 1d0c144e22d2 (server_default backfill, down_revision a1b2c3d4e5f6 = head, upgrade/downgrade verified). toeic_generator + bank_admin now filter all bank queries by exam_type=='TOEIC' (QuestionGroup via .join(QuestionGroup.questions).filter(...).distinct() since group has no column; clones carry exam_type/language); parser.import_b1_reading_set imports B1 Reading+Writing into the bank as exam_type='VSTEP_B1'. Claude verified independently: pytest 65/0 x2 (generator/bank/parser 29/0 no regression), SPEC-BANK-004 test is non-tautological (generate_toeic_exam yields 200/200 all-TOEIC even with APPROVED B1 questions in the bank -> real isolation, not just status), and the REAL EB1-2601 import puts 32 VSTEP_B1 questions in the bank. NOT deployed (column auto-added via create_all on next deploy; B1 not playable until step 3). A1-CORE (S43/S44, 26/06, commit 37b30ea, SPEC-GEN-008 active): VSTEP B1 generate-từ-bank XONG. toeic_generator parameterized 6 hardcoded exam_type=='TOEIC' -> structure.get('exam_type', 'TOEIC') (TOEIC default => no regress; supports VSTEP_B1 + MINI_TOEIC test variant); added VSTEP_B1_BLUEPRINT (11 parts summing to 50: R1 standalone 10, R2 standalone 5, R3 grouped 1x5, R4 grouped 1x10, W1/W2 standalone 1 each, L1 standalone 5, L2 grouped 1x10, S1/S2/S3 standalone 1 each; no difficulty matrix/subset_sum; balance_answers=False). exam_admin.generate_demo_exam + generate_batch_exams route VSTEP_B1 -> VSTEP_B1_BLUEPRINT; /api/v1/exams/generate (schema ExamGenerateRequest + route) accepts exam_type (default TOEIC, backward-compat). Claude verified INDEPENDENTLY: boundary 6 CODE files correct (declared, NO spray); pytest 74/0; test_SPEC_GEN_008 is non-tautological E2E (seeds approved B1 bank -> POST /generate exam_type=VSTEP_B1 -> asserts exactly 50 questions, parts 1-11 with correct per-part counts/types, L1 audio_url+image_url + L2 group audio_url CLONED to the exam, AND TOEIC non-regression: generate TOEIC -> 200 questions with NO writing/speaking B1 leak); ruff(app/)+architecture clean. Claude's 2 review flags fixed (total=50 not 46; W1/W2 count=1 consistent with real đề + GRADE-006). Anti touched all 3 harness files (claude-progress/feature_list/session-handoff, brief forbade) + mangled handoff + over-claimed -> Claude reverted 3 files + wrote them itself. => PIPELINE B1 FULL: enrich bank 4 skills -> approve -> generate diverse đề (local). STILL pending (separate A1-DEPLOY): host audio/image assets for deploying generated B1 đề to Render (4 options sketched: commit-our-assets / Drive+bootstrap / object-store / regenerate-at-build) + frontend exam_type selector at /admin -> A1-DEPLOY-FE DONE (S45, 26/06, commit 171af60, FF-merged to Dat): admin page gains a TOEIC/VSTEP B1 <select> wired to generateExam(title, exam_type); api.ts generateExam(title, examType?, seed?) puts exam_type in the POST body (omitted when undefined => backend defaults TOEIC, backward-compat). Claude verified independently: boundary clean (only 2 FE files, NO backend/models/harness), tsc exit 0, npm run build PASS, single caller safe (no positional seed clash). Browser B1-generate E2E deferred to A1-DEPLOY-BE (bank still draft/30, not seeded+approved on a running instance). STILL pending A1-DEPLOY-BE: bootstrap-seed enriched+approved B1 bank + its TTS/image assets onto Render via Drive+cloud_bootstrap (host approach Dat chose 26/06). HSK generator = CN track, deferred (EN-first per project strategy). A1-DEPLOY-BE (S45, 26/06, commit b9e9703, FF-merged to Dat): deploy infra to seed enriched B1 bank + assets onto Render via Drive+cloud_bootstrap. NEW backend/scripts/export_b1_bank.py (dump bank exam_type==VSTEP_B1, exam_id IS NULL -> portable JSON with stored content_hash + /static/ asset list, verifies files exist on disk) + backend/scripts/seed_b1_bank.py (reads JSON, idempotent upsert via EXPORTED content_hash NOT recompute, remaps child group_id to new group id, round-trips all fields, status->approved for question+parent group, never touches TOEIC) + cloud_bootstrap.py adds _b1_bank_already_seeded guard + _seed_b1_bank_from_archive (gdown zip via env B1_BANK_ZIP_ID, extract assets to static/audio_gen|img, seed) wrapped in isolated try/except (B1 bank fail -> WARNING, site still runs TOEIC/2601) + test_seed_b1_bank.py. Claude verified INDEPENDENTLY: boundary clean (5 files, NO models/generator/frontend/harness; verify script + artifacts NOT committed), pytest 75/0, code matches approved plan v2 on all 4 points; REAL-DATA verify (no Drive): exported 30 real B1 questions from grading_db -> seeded into clean DB TWICE -> idempotent (30 q/3 groups both runs, 0 duplication), all approved, 25 children remapped to real groups (0 bad refs). CAVEAT (not a code defect): bank only has 30 enriched B1 questions across parts 1/2/3/4/7/8; parts 5/6 (Writing) + 9/10/11 (Speaking) = 0 -> generate B1 from bank CANNOT yet produce a full 50-question exam. Needs more enrichment (run enrich_b1_bank.py CLI to ~20/part) before LIVE deploy yields a playable generated B1 exam. Drive end-to-end pending Đạt uploading the export+asset zip + setting B1_BANK_ZIP_ID on Render. [S50 01/07] XÓA HẲN TOEIC: bỏ features generator TOEIC-only (subset-sum/ma-trận-độ-khó/topic-diversity/cân-bằng-đáp-án + TOEIC_BLUEPRINT) → generator giờ CHỈ standalone/grouped cho VSTEP B1; xóa spec/test GEN-001/002/003/004 + MATRIX-002 + ISOLATE-003. GIỮ GEN-005/006/007/008 + VALIDATE-001 (đã rewrite sang B1). Verify: pytest 59/0, B1 generate bank thật 50 câu diverse, LIVE OK.

features.name: Automated Exam Validator Gate
features.description: Checks generated exams against constraints, question overlap limits (<40%), and content completeness.
features.evidence: Implemented unified validation module validate_exam in app/services/exam_validator.py checking GEN-001 (blueprint counts by part type), MATRIX-002 (per-part difficulty, skipping Part 7), GEN-003 (topic diversity covering P7), GEN-002 (options balance), and ISOLATE-003 (group isolation/orphans). Integrated post-check validation in toeic_generator.py; validation failure triggers atomic deletion (Question -> QuestionGroup -> Exam with synchronize_session=False + commit) and raises ExamValidationError. Added SPEC-VALIDATE-001 in specs.json. Fully tested in tests/test_specs_generation.py: refactored all generation tests to use validate_exam; added test_SPEC_VALIDATE_001_post_check_cleanup (verifies rollback on failure via monkeypatch); added test_validate_exam_catches_violations (manual database injection of constraint violations). Suite stable across two runs: 37 passed / 2 skipped / 2 xfailed; ruff clean; architecture checks pass.

features.name: Exam Submission & Automated Grading API
features.description: Enables candidates to submit exam answers and automatically grades them via the TOEIC grader.
features.evidence: Full candidate exam-taking + auto-grading loop, frozen models reused (no model change). BACKEND: POST /api/v1/exams/{exam_id}/submit (auth) persists Submission+SubmissionDetail, runs grade_toeic_submission (TOEIC scaled scoring via GRADE-001 table), returns L/R/total (SPEC-SUBMIT-001); GET /api/v1/submissions/{id} gated owner|admin|teacher; GET /api/v1/exams/{exam_id}/submissions (admin/teacher list per-exam results) + GET /api/v1/submissions/me (candidate own history) (SPEC-SUBMIT-002). Scores stored in semantically-named columns Grade.score_listening / Grade.score_reading (SPEC-GRADE-002 active, gap closed): migration a1b2c3d4e5f6 adds the two columns (additive, Float nullable); toeic_grader writes L/R there, submission_admin + all listing endpoints read them; score_speaking/score_writing retained for the essay/AI grading path. Claude verified: pytest 47/1/0 (GRADE-002 xfail->pass) + end-to-end real grading run (all-correct -> score_listening=495/score_reading=495, speaking/writing stay 0). FRONTEND: /exam/[id]/take take-exam UI (C2, login-gated, submits ALL questions incl. blank), /exams catalog + /register + role-based login routing (C3 candidate portal), /admin/results/[examId] teacher results table + /my-results candidate history (C5). Verified by tests/test_specs_submission.py::test_SPEC_SUBMIT_001/002 (pytest 46/1/1) + Claude LIVE-curl on Render (register->login->submit->grade, all-correct=990) + browser (candidate take->score; teacher 5-row results table). C1/C2/C3 DEPLOYED LIVE (main 9721c6b); C4/C5 + GRADE-002 on Dat awaiting deploy. C6 (Dat): candidate Writing UI — TakeView renders a textarea for type='writing' questions and polls getSubmission until status='completed', then shows the AI score + per-essay feedback; SubmissionResult scores made nullable; CELERY_TASK_ALWAYS_EAGER added so essay grading completes inline without a separate Celery worker/Redis (local demo + Render free). C7 (Dat): VSTEP B1 demo exam (2nd exam type) seeded directly (scripts/seed_vstep_demo.py: Reading MCQ + Writing) and the result panel shows BOTH the auto-graded MCQ score and the AI Writing feedback for mixed exams. Verified browser end-to-end (VSTEP take -> 3/4 reading + AI writing 8/10). NOTE: multi-exam-type generation from the shared bank is blocked until Question gets an exam_type/language column (frozen model, needs Đạt approval); VSTEP currently seeded, not generated. C8 (exam_type+writing_score in listing -> teacher results table + /my-results show essay scores). C9 (/submissions/[id] detail page: read essay/answer + AI feedback; owner|teacher gated, linked from results table + history). C10 (Speaking: POST /submissions/upload-audio stores recording -> audio_url; TakeView record/upload UI; grade_speaking AI-graded; detail page shows audio player + transcription + pronunciation). GRADE-003+C6+C7+C8+C9+C10 DEPLOYED LIVE (main 682dd18: Speaking record/upload + grade). C11 (SPEC-SUBMIT-003, on Dat): teacher/admin human-in-the-loop override — PATCH /submissions/{id}/grade adjusts score_writing/speaking + teacher_note, recomputes total, gated admin/teacher (403/401/404); SubmissionDetailView shows an edit panel for teachers (getMe role) and the teacher note for everyone; no model schema change. AI grading is mock on LIVE until GEMINI_API_KEY set on Render. Verified: pytest 53/0/0 + browser end-to-end (teacher edits 8->6.5+note persisted; candidate sees score+note but no edit panel). C15 SERVER-AUTHORITATIVE EXAM SESSION (SPEC-SCALE-003 AC /start + /autosave, no model change): POST /api/v1/exams/{id}/start finds-or-creates an in-progress attempt (status='in_progress', submitted_at NULL) and returns server-computed remaining_seconds (from started_at — survives reload, can't be reset client-side) + any autosaved answers for resume; POST /api/v1/submissions/{id}/autosave upserts in-progress answers (owner-gated, 404 if missing/not-owned/already-submitted) so a disconnect/crash doesn't lose work; create_submission_and_grade now REUSES the in-progress attempt on submit (backward compatible — a direct submit without /start still creates one) so start+submit yields a single submission row; listings exclude not-yet-submitted attempts. Frontend TakeView: startExam() calls startAttempt (timer from server + restores saved answers), autosaves every 15s, resumes on reload. Verified: pytest 56/0/0 (+test_exam_session_start_autosave_resume_submit non-tautological + test_autosave_gating) + browser end-to-end on real demo DB (start -> timer 119:42 from server not 120:00; select answer -> backend logs repeated /autosave 200; reload+start -> timer 117:35 continues + the selected answer restored; console only the expected headless webcam errors). DEPLOYED LIVE (main 61acff6): verified end-to-end on Render (START remaining 7200 -> AUTOSAVE saved 1 -> RESUME same attempt 7195 + answer restored -> SUBMIT reuse=True -> /me count=1). C16 RESUME-FROM-LIST (build on C15, no model change): GET /api/v1/submissions/active lists the candidate's in-progress attempts (submitted_at IS NULL, active exams only) with exam_title + server-computed remaining_seconds; /exams page shows an 'Đang làm dở' badge + an amber 'Tiếp tục bài đang làm →' button for those exams so an interrupted attempt is resumable from the catalog (not only by navigating back to the take URL). Verified: pytest 57/0/0 (+test_active_attempts_listing: empty -> start -> 1 active -> submit -> empty; guest 401) + browser (exam with in-progress attempt shows the resume badge/button amber, others normal; console clean). C16 DEPLOYED LIVE (main d575de1, verified /active BEFORE [] -> START [1 attempt] -> SUBMIT []). C17 TEACHER LIVE INVIGILATION (build on C15, no model change): GET /api/v1/exams/{id}/active-attempts (admin/teacher only) lists candidates currently taking the exam (in-progress, submitted_at NULL) with name + start time + server-computed remaining_seconds; /admin/results/[examId] shows a live 'Đang làm bài (N)' panel (pulsing dot + per-candidate remaining time + 'Làm mới' refresh). Verified: pytest 58/0/0 (+test_exam_active_attempts_invigilation: empty -> candidate starts -> teacher sees 1 with username + remaining>0 -> candidate gets 403 -> after submit empty) + browser (teacher view shows 3 in-progress with names + remaining e.g. 118:51, refresh button; console clean). C17 DEPLOYED LIVE (main 8142392, gating verified: candidate 403 / no-token 401, frontend bundle has the panel). C18 EXPORT RESULTS CSV: GET /api/v1/exams/{id}/results.csv (admin/teacher) returns text/csv with a UTF-8 BOM (so Excel renders Vietnamese names) — a header row + one row per submitted result (name, username, listening/reading/writing, total, status, submitted_at); reuses list_exam_submissions (no model/service change); ResultsView shows a '⬇ Xuất CSV' button (fetch+blob download). Verified: pytest 59/0/0 (+test_export_exam_results_csv: ord(body[0])==0xFEFF BOM, header + candidate row, candidate 403, missing exam 404) + browser (button shown; endpoint 200 text/csv; header 'Họ tên,Tài khoản,Điểm Nghe,...' + 9 lines incl. candidate row; console clean — note Response.text() strips BOM for display but raw blob/download keeps it). NOT deployed (Dat only). S41 (25/06, branch feat/b1-real-exam, SPEC-GRADE-006): VSTEP B1 100-point grading system implemented. Calculations: Reading (30 max), Listening (20 max), Writing (30 max), Speaking (20 max) with automatic 50-point pass condition and 30% liệt gates. Added compare_fill_answer for slash-separated gaps. Celery routing updated for VSTEP_B1. override_grade re-evaluates the pass/fail result. Seeded real B1 2601 exam (50 Qs) idempotently. Verified via test_SPEC_GRADE_006_vstep_b1_grading (pytest 67 passed x2).

features.name: Teacher Exam Analytics Dashboard API
features.description: Calculates average score statistics and detailed item analysis for choice, writing, and speaking questions on a completed exam.
features.evidence: Implemented get_exam_analytics in backend/app/services/submission_admin.py and GET /api/v1/exams/{exam_id}/analytics in backend/app/api/submissions.py (SPEC-STATS-001 active). Calculations: score_summary (mean, min, max); item analysis (choice: correct_rate, option_distribution; writing/speaking: avg_score with safe float try-except guards). Gating: admin/teacher roles allowed (200), candidate forbidden (403), unauthorized (401), non-existent (404). Tested in tests/test_specs_stats.py: test_SPEC_STATS_001_exam_analytics seeds exam with 2 choice, 1 writing, 1 speaking, runs 3 candidate submissions through Celery eager mode + AI mock, verifies statistics (score_summary mean=14.0, min=8.0, max=17.5) and item analyses (choice correct_rate, writing avg_score=8.0, speaking avg_score=5.0, answered_count excludes empty responses). test_exam_analytics_gating verifies gating rules. Pytest pass x2, ruff, architecture check clean. Claude independently re-verified (read diff line-by-line, pytest 62/0 x2, traceability 4/4) and DEPLOYED the backend endpoint LIVE (origin/main 4d5a24f; verified the new build swapped via the route's 404->401 transition with no token). FRONTEND PANEL (S38, branch feat/analytics-ui, commit 0817918 -> FF Dat): '📊 Phân tích' panel in /admin/results/[id] (frontend/src/lib/api.ts getExamAnalytics + types; ResultsView.tsx panel below the active-attempts panel) — score summary (mean/min/max toFixed(1)) + item-analysis table (correct_rate colored Dễ>=90%/Khó<=30%/TB on the raw 0..1 value then shown as %, option_distribution mini, avg_score AI '/10'); analytics fetch wrapped in its OWN try (401/403 redirect, other errors show a local notice instead of blanking the results table); degrades to 'Chưa có dữ liệu phân tích' when 0 submissions. Anti respected boundaries the FIRST time (correct branch, only 2 frontend files, NO harness edits). Claude independently verified: npx tsc --noEmit clean + npm run build PASS + REAL browser (seeded a local demo DB with 1 exam + 3 graded submissions, teacher token, preview): panel renders correct numbers (3 submissions / mean 9.0 / min 8.0 / max 10.0; Q1 '100% (Dễ)' A:2; Q2 '50% (Trung bình)' A:1 B:1; Writing '8.0/10'), results table not blanked, console 0 errors. Frontend push/deploy (Vercel) held for Đạt.

features.name: B1 Question Bank Enrichment (AI-generated)
features.description: Dùng Gemini sinh thêm câu hỏi VSTEP B1 làm giàu ngân hàng (việc-2), theo Ma trận B1 + 4 mức nhận thức.
features.evidence: A2-ĐỌC slice (S43, 26/06, commit 8071ff2, SPEC-ENRICH-001 active): backend/app/services/b1_question_gen.py (B1QuestionGenerator) sinh phần ĐỌC text-only... TOÀN BỘ ENRICHMENT B1 (việc-2) XONG 4 KỸ NĂNG: Đọc R1/R2/R3/R4 + Viết W1/W2 + Nói S1/S2/S3 + Nghe L1(chọn-tranh)/L2(điền), sinh câu+đáp án+TTS+ảnh AI vào bank draft, 0 dependency mới. Cập nhật ngày 30/06: Nâng cấp mặc định lên Gemini 3.5 Flash (gemini-3.5-flash), tích hợp thành công Bộ chọn Độ khó (Difficulty: Ngẫu nhiên, Dễ, Trung bình, Khó) đồng bộ từ UI tới backend API và dynamic prompt cho Gemini, đã chạy pytest 76/76 passed. S51 (01/07, SPEC-BANK-006 active): SINH CÂU BẤT ĐỒNG BỘ — thêm backend/app/services/enrich_jobs.py (in-memory job store + run_generator dùng chung với /enrich đồng bộ + run_enrich_job + dispatch_enrich_job), celery task enrich_bank_task (workers/tasks.py), POST /api/v1/bank/enrich-async (nhận lô tới 50 câu, trả job_id ngay) + GET /api/v1/bank/tasks/{job_id} (tiến độ), schemas EnrichAsyncResult/EnrichJobStatus. Executor: worker Celery khi có broker; thread nội tiến trình khi Render free không Redis (kể cả eager) -> POST trả nhanh, lô 50 không timeout; test dùng RUN_JOBS_INLINE cho tất định. KHÔNG đụng model (job store in-memory, giới hạn MVP 1 tiến trình + evict _MAX_JOBS=500). /enrich đồng bộ refactor tái dùng run_generator (BANK-005 giữ nguyên hành vi). Test test_SPEC_BANK_006_async_question_enrichment_api non-tautological (count=8 async CHẤP NHẬN vs /enrich đồng bộ chặn 400; job completed; generated_count khớp câu nháp DB; count>50/part-lạ 400; job lạ 404; candidate 403 + anon 401 trên cả POST/GET). Nghiệm thu độc lập Claude: pytest 60/0, ruff + check-architecture sạch. CHƯA deploy (chờ review + quyết định của Đạt); frontend polling UI là follow-up (panel hiện dùng /enrich đồng bộ ≤5).
